display.purpose: Page hero values and mode banner. Rare.

headline.purpose: Page H1 across Atlas, Vendor, Labs.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal titles, section dividers.

body.purpose: Paragraph text and table cell prose. Cap 65 to 75 ch.

label.purpose: Section headers, column heads, button text, status pills. The operator-editorial voice.

num.purpose: Every number in a table or list. Tabular, slashed zero.

num-display.purpose: KPI tile values, donut center totals, headline numbers.

shadows.name: card-resting
shadows.purpose: Card at rest on paper. So subtle it reads as 1px separation, not a lift.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Card response to hover. The interactive announcement.

shadows.name: ring-accent
shadows.purpose: Affirmation ring on card-glow and focus-visible states.

motion.name: dur-fast
motion.purpose: Micro state changes: hover, focus, pill fill.

motion.name: dur-standard
motion.purpose: Button transitions, input focus, dropdown open.

motion.name: dur-medium
motion.purpose: Card hover lift, modal scrim fade, panel slide.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action. Vermilion outline, fills on hover, label stencil typography.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 14px; border: 1px solid #B5321A; background: transparent; color: #B5321A; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #B5321A; color: #F4EFE6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgb(181 50 26 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(16 48 46 / 0.4); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. No border at rest; cream sunk fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: #3A342D; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #EBE4D7; color: #141210; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat at rest, lifts on hover. 1px hairline border instead of strong resting shadow.
components.html:
VENDOR OVERVIEW
Card body content.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FAF6EE; border: 1px solid rgb(20 18 16 / 0.12); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgb(20 18 16 / 0.04), 0 4px 12px rgb(20 18 16 / 0.06); transition: box-shadow 240ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgb(20 18 16 / 0.06), 0 8px 20px rgb(20 18 16 / 0.10); } .ds-card-head { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #3A342D; padding: 14px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(20 18 16 / 0.06); } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px 20px; color: #141210; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Sunken input well, not raised. Vermilion focus ring at 60% alpha.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #EBE4D7; border: 1px solid rgb(20 18 16 / 0.12); color: #141210; border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7A7167; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgb(181 50 26 / 0.6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(181 50 26 / 0.18); }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: True pill (999px radius), 1px border, label stencil typography. Used for status and category tags.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 8px; border: 1px solid rgb(20 18 16 / 0.24); color: #3A342D; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; } .ds-pill-amber { border-color: rgb(181 50 26 / 0.5); color: #B5321A; } .ds-pill-dot { display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: currentColor; }

components.name: Ledger Row
components.description: Tabular row, zero-border, hairline separator, hover sunk fill. The page-of-record style.
components.css: .ds-ledger { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px; color: #141210; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-ledger thead th { text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7A7167; padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(20 18 16 / 0.24); background: transparent; } .ds-ledger tbody td { padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(20 18 16 / 0.06); vertical-align: middle; } .ds-ledger tbody tr:hover td { background: #EBE4D7; } .ds-ledger-num { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-feature-settings: 'tnum', 'zero', 'ss19'; letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-align: right; }

components.name: KPI Tile
components.description: Number plus label. JetBrains Mono numeric display, Hanken stencil label. No supporting micro-stats; this is not the SaaS hero-metric template.
components.css: .ds-kpi { background: #FAF6EE; border: 1px solid rgb(20 18 16 / 0.12); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgb(20 18 16 / 0.04), 0 4px 12px rgb(20 18 16 / 0.06); } .ds-kpi-label { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7A7167; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-kpi-value { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-feature-settings: 'tnum', 'zero', 'ss19'; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: #141210; line-height: 1.1; }

components.name: Sidebar Item
components.description: Icon-only rail, vermilion left border on active route. Active border is 1px (per Side-Stripe ban), not a stripe.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; color: #7A7167; border-left: 1px solid transparent; transition: color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1), background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.20, 0.60, 0.20, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #3A342D; background: #EBE4D7; } .ds-nav-active { color: #B5321A; border-left-color: #B5321A; background: #FAF6EE; }

narrative.overview: Autocrawl is an operator surface that reads like an intelligence dossier and runs like a Linear-tier product tool. Every screen is a page of a long-running brief: tabular numerics on a calm cream ground, label stencils tracked uppercase, vermilion accent appearing where it counts and nowhere else. The operator is in a session of hours, not minutes; the surface must hold density without burning the eyes, must convey provenance without ornament, must keep the tool serving the task. The system explicitly rejects the bland Notion/Linear-default neutral aesthetic and the operator-cyber HUD aesthetic. Between those two cliffs, Autocrawl sits on paper editorial ground.
keyCharacteristics: Refined, precise, confident — three words that govern every detail.
Two themes, one identity: Paper (default) and Ink (operator-night) using the same token names with swapped values.
Flat-by-default surfaces; shadow appears only as response to state.
Hanken Grotesk for UI and headlines, JetBrains Mono for every number. Two type families, no third.
150 to 250 millisecond ease-out transitions. No page-load choreography, no decorative pulse.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary accent (vermilion on paper, amber on dark) is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is its meaning.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: No #000 and no #fff. Every neutral carries a brand-hue tint.

rules.name: The Status-By-Hue-And-Symbol Rule
rules.body: Status is never conveyed by color alone. Every status indicator pairs a color token with an icon or text label.

rules.name: The Two-Family Rule
rules.body: Hanken for UI, JetBrains for numerics. No third font, ever.

rules.name: The Tabular Numerics Rule
rules.body: Every number consumed by the eye-as-data uses JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums and slashed zero.

rules.name: The Label-Stencil Rule
rules.body: Section headers, column heads, button text, status pills, KPI labels all use the Label style (10.5px, 600 weight, 0.12em tracking, uppercase).

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as responses to state.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter blur as decoration is forbidden.

dos: Do keep the primary accent under 10% of any given screen.
Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue. Warm Ash Cream is oklch(95% 0.012 80) not #fff.
Do use Hanken Grotesk for UI and JetBrains Mono for numerics.
Do use the Label stencil for section headers, column heads, button text, status pills.
Do keep cards flat at rest; lift on hover.
Do pair every status color with an icon or text label.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders. border-left or border-right greater than 1 pixel as a colored accent is forbidden.
Don't use gradient text via background-clip text.
Don't use backdrop-filter blur as decoration.
Don't default to modal as first thought.
Don't use Roboto, Inter, or any third font.
Don't use SaaS purple-to-pink gradients, glow text, or glassmorphic card stacks.
Don't use HUD cyberpunk neon glow, scanline overlays, or bracket UI decoration.
Don't use em-dash or en-dash or semicolon in user-facing copy and ops reports.
